case_for: Beckham has shown occasional touchdown-dependent spike weeks in the past, so any single defensive lapse or red-zone target could push him past 12 points despite a low floor.
case_against: His recent usage has been minimal to nonexistent (multiple 0.0 games and sub-5 point outputs), showing he's not a consistent target and the 4.5 pt projection reflects a marginal, low-volume role.
